meta_desc: Personal site containing basic information, experience, academic background, and application sections for Celal Oğuz Kurtoğlu.
identity_lead: Software engineer working in Flutter, SwiftUI, Python, Java, data science, and machine learning. Computer Engineering master's student at Çukurova University.
card_summary_text: Experience in Flutter, SwiftUI, Python, Java, data science, deep learning, and machine learning. Conducts mobile app development and research-oriented studies.
career_nexcore_desc: Developing iOS / Android products with Dart and Flutter. Working in coordination with teams on the UI/UX side.
career_kodland_desc: Worked on Python and Unity teaching, mentoring, and project-based technical lecturing.
career_bau_desc: Provided technical contribution with Python, JavaScript, HTML, and PHP in the project within the scope of MÜDEK.
academic_ms_desc: Computer Engineering · AI / ML / DL · 3.81 GPA
pub_1_desc: Joint study published in the Diagnostics journal. You can open the article page by clicking on the card.
pub_2_desc: Oral presentation study included in the proceedings book of the EurasianSciEnTech 2024 conference. You can open the PDF file by clicking on the card.
apps_web_desc: Web platforms with modern interfaces and interactive experiences.
app_globe_desc: Watch television channels around the world simultaneously with a modern and interactive 3D globe.
